title: Arm jumps 16% as company expects revenue windfall from new chip, a 'significant shift'
summary_full: Arm said it expects its new chip to generate six times more revenue in 2031 than the $4 billion it made in 2025.
summary_public: Arm said it expects its new chip to generate six times more revenue in 2031 than the $4 billion it made in 2025.
